title: Pyro's MTR Deco (archived)
description:
A Small Mod That Add Some Things To MTR

(Place A MTR Platform Block Under My Platform Blocks)
body:
A Small Mod That Adds Some Things To MTR! It Adds To New Stairs Witch Are Blue & Sandy Marble Stairs To Match The Blue & Sandy Marble Blocks & Slabs, White Siding (For Houses), Running Man EXIT Sign (For Buldings) & A Dont Spit Panting (For Stations).
**Q:**Now Why Would I Want To Downloadt It? **A:**For Now Just Some Decorations (But More To Come In The Future!)  **NOTE:**My Platform Blocks Need An MTR Platform Block Under It)
